questions.question: Who is the author of 'Iswaran the Storyteller'?
questions.answer: R.K. Laxman.

questions.question: Who is Mahendra?
questions.answer: Mahendra is a junior supervisor at a construction company.

questions.question: Who is Iswaran?
questions.answer: Iswaran is Mahendra’s cook and companion.

questions.question: What was Mahendra’s job?
questions.answer: He supervised activities at construction sites.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra have to move frequently?
questions.answer: Because his job required him to work at different sites.

questions.question: What special talent did Iswaran have?
questions.answer: He was a very good storyteller.

questions.question: What kind of books did Iswaran like to read?
questions.answer: He liked reading popular Tamil thrillers.

questions.question: What animal did Iswaran describe in one of his stories?
questions.answer: A mad elephant.

questions.question: How did Iswaran claim to stop the elephant?
questions.answer: He said he hit its toenail with a stick.

questions.question: What martial art did Iswaran mention?
questions.answer: Karate or jujitsu.

questions.question: What special dish did Iswaran prepare one night?
questions.answer: A delicious dinner for an auspicious day.

questions.question: What did Iswaran say the factory area used to be?
questions.answer: A burial ground.

questions.question: What ghost did Iswaran describe?
questions.answer: A female ghost holding a foetus.

questions.question: How did Mahendra react to the ghost story?
questions.answer: He said ghosts were imaginary.

questions.question: When did the ghost appear according to Iswaran?
questions.answer: On full-moon nights.

questions.question: What sound woke Mahendra at night?
questions.answer: A low moaning sound.

questions.question: What did Mahendra see outside the window?
questions.answer: A dark cloudy figure.

questions.question: How did Mahendra feel after seeing the figure?
questions.answer: He felt frightened.

questions.question: What explanation did Mahendra give to himself?
questions.answer: He thought it was imagination or auto-suggestion.

questions.question: What did Iswaran say the next morning?
questions.answer: He said Mahendra had seen the ghost.

questions.question: What effect did Iswaran’s stories have on Mahendra?
questions.answer: They created fear in his mind.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra enjoy Iswaran’s stories?
questions.answer: Because they were exciting and entertaining.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra decide to leave the place?
questions.answer: Because he was frightened by the ghost incident.

questions.question: What theme is shown in the story?
questions.answer: The power of imagination and storytelling.

questions.question: What quality made Iswaran interesting?
questions.answer: His imaginative storytelling.
